title: Sanji and Zoro Reach Their Limits
description: On pages 18–20, this part focuses on Unknown person #17, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #19 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should at least use a blade when you go for the kill!!
